name: Quick'n Easy Mexican Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 30 ounces pinto beans (2 15 oz. cans), undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, cook bacon until crisp. Remove with a slotted spoon.
2. Cook onion in drippings until tender but not brown. Return bacon to the saucepan.
3. Add remaining ingredients and bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
4. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
Variation:
1. Brown 1 pound ground beef with the bacon.
2. Also add a 14 1/2 ounce can of whole tomatoes, 1/2 teaspoon ground cumin, 1 tablespoon chile powder, and 3 small cloves garlic (crushed and sauteed with onion).
